arts.ttl: Chelsea put off by goalkeeper’s €80m asking price
arts.sum: Chelsea made multiple enquiries to sign AC Milan goalkeeper Mike Maignan in the summer but were put off by the player’s €80m (£66.7m) asking price. The West London side sought to sign a new first-choice goalkeeper in the summer after allowing Djordje Petrovic and Kepa Arrizabalaga to leave on loan.
